name: Qingdao Kingking Applied Chemistry Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Kingking Applied Chemistry Co., Ltd. produces and sells candles and craft products. The company's products include polymer matrix composite candlelight material products, daily-use candle products, and craft glass products. It is also involved in the production and sale of cosmetics; and oil trading activities. The company was formerly known as Qingdao Jinhai Craft Products Co., Ltd. Qingdao Kingking Applied Chemistry Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1977 and is based in Qingdao, China.
